content_body: Our family had a wonderful vacation. We went to Consolidated Gold Mines in Dahlonega and took a tour of the cave & mined for gold and gemstones. Then we rode the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway. We had a campfire, roasted s'mores, and enjoyed family time together. We hiked Fall Branch Falls and saw its beauty. We enjoyed our time in the mountains and staying in this cabin!
title: A Wonderful Family Vacation
